Aether Compass.name: Aether Compass

This plugin detects certain objects/NPCs such as Aether Currents nearby and shows where they are by various ways, e.g. pointing to their locations on screen and notifying you in Chat.

Currently detects:
	- Aether Currents
	- Eureka Elementals (by apetih)
	- Mob Hunt Elite Marks
	- Gathering Points
	- [Experimental] Island Sanctuary Gathering Objects and Animals
	- [Experimental] Quest-related NPCs/Objects 

Note: Because most objects/NPCs are not loaded when they are too faraway or when there are too many entities nearby (such as too many player characters), they will not be detected in this case.

Icon by Lumas Arkfrost
Aether Compass.punchline: Compasses that detect and mark certain nearby objects/NPCs

	- Craft planning

	- Item window that includes vendor and source information among other things
	- Duty/mob/airship/submarine windows that are fully searchable
	- A filtering system that lets you setup complex searches for specific items 
	- Tooltip integration that'll let you see where the items are on hover
Allagan Tools.punchline: Get organized in FFXIV, easily locate/show where to sort items, plan your crafting, and search for mobs, duties, airships, and submarines!

Ascended Rotation Solver Reborn.name: Ascended Rotation Solver Reborn
Ascended Rotation Solver Reborn.description:
Personal fork of RotationSolverReborn that adds PvPSmart, a scoring-based PvP target selector. PvE behavior matches upstream.

The stock PvP cycle ranks targets by absolute current HP, which biases toward tanks over genuinely vulnerable squishies. PvPSmart composes weighted factors (role value, effective HP, finish-kill bias, mitigation penalty, distance, hysteresis, crystal carrier, LB cast, isolation, threat) and skips invuln targets entirely, producing more focus-fire-friendly target selection in Crystalline Conflict.

Use only if you specifically want the PvPSmart targeting mode. For general use, install upstream RotationSolverReborn instead.
Ascended Rotation Solver Reborn.punchline: PvPSmart target selection on top of RotationSolverReborn.

Injects row probabilities, exact shuffle averages, and shuffle advice into the Wondrous Tails journal, and adds a standalone plugin window so the same information is reachable when the journal isn't open.

AutoMammet.name: AutoMammet
AutoMammet.description: Provides an easy copy and pastable CSV format you can use for island sanctuary spreadsheets.       - Customisable output formats such as hours or minutes

      - Simple window to see current session playtime

• Resistance relic guide and tracking.
• Info about Lost Actions, Fragments, FATEs/CE, Field Notes e.g. location, drops, marketboard price, fate chains, mettle rewards, exp rewards, etc.
• Node graph viewer.
• Weather forecast.

- Advanced actor posing 
	- While animating
	- Adjust actor positions without them resetting
	- Overlay and graphical posing modes
- Creation of up to 239 G-Pose actors
- Creation of custom lights
- Supports integration with Penumbra, Glamourer & Customize+

- Control Time/Weather in both the Overworld and G-Pose

Character Data Sync.name: Character Data Sync
Character Data Sync.description: This plugin allows you to use your character data from your main character on all others.
Character Data Sync.punchline: Sync your character data from your main character to all others

Character Data Sync X.name: Character Data Sync X
Character Data Sync X.description:
在插件设置界面选择好主角色后, 自动同步你主角色游戏设置数据至所有角色上
相比原版: 重写了界面, 提供了明确的主角色设置, 不会再动你的原始数据文件, 而是把非主角色的文件读取重定向至主角色
Character Data Sync X.punchline: 用你的主角色设置数据游玩所有角色~

Character Panel Refined.name: Character Panel Refined
Character Panel Refined.description: Character Panel Refined cuts away useless information from the character panel, while adding useful stats like critical hit and direct hit percentages as well as estimates damage output to allow for easier comparison of gear.
Character Panel Refined.punchline: Refine the character panel to display only useful information like crit and direct hit chance

Character Select+.name: Character Select+
Character Select+.description:
Character Select+ allows you to create, save, and instantly apply fully customized character profiles with the press of a button. Switch between your OCs effortlessly using /select CharacterName, applying Penumbra Collections, Glamourer Designs, Customize+ Profiles, and Honorific Titles in one command.

While profile switching is its core purpose, Character Select+ includes additional features:
✔ Advanced Mode – Create custom macro setups for deeper character customization.
✔ Profile-Specific Designs – Use multiple outfits, styles, and looks per character.
✔ Favorites & Sorting – Keep profiles organized by name, date, or importance.
✔ Quick Swap Bar! 
✔ One-Click Macro Execution – Run predefined commands instantly when selecting a character.

Whether you're roleplaying, gposing, or just love quick customization, Character Select+ makes switching between characters faster, easier, and seamless.

Character Select+ (KR).name: Character Select+ (KR)
Character Select+ (KR).description:
Instant Character Switching Made Simple

Create and save character profiles, then switch between them instantly. Applies Penumbra Collections, Glamourer Designs, Customize+ Profiles, Honorifics, Moodles, and Idles.Key Features: One-click character switching, multiple designs per character, advanced macro support, roleplay profiles, a character gallery, and immersive dialogue options. Perfect for roleplayers, gposers, and anyone who loves seamless character customization without manually switching between multiple plugins.
Character Select+ (KR).punchline: Swap between your OCs with a single click

Chat 2.name: Chat 2
Chat 2.description:
Chat 2 is a complete rewrite of the in-game chat window as a plugin.
It supports:

- Unlimited tabs
- Tabs that always send to a certain channel
- More flexible filtering
- RGB channel colouring
- Completely variable font size
- Sidebar tabs
- Unread counts
- Emotes
- Screenshot mode (obfuscate names)
Chat 2.punchline: Electric Boogaloo - ♪ A whole new chat, a new fantastic chat window ♪

Chat Butt Bubbles.name: Chat Butt Bubbles
Chat Butt Bubbles.description: Using native chat bubble display, see who is talking about what in a more natural fashion.

Chat Casino.name: Chat Casino
Chat Casino.description: A fully-featured casino engine for FFXIV. Use /casino to open the interface.

Chat Extender.name: Chat Extender
Chat Extender.description: This plugin adds functionality to FFXIV in-game chat.

Chat Proximity.name: Chat Proximity
Chat Proximity.description: This plugin will change message in the chat within the "say" channel (or other ranged channels), darkening people when they're far from you.
Chat Proximity.punchline: Know how far they talk from.

Chat Tools.name: Chat Tools
Chat Tools.description:
Chat Tools was developed to cut through the cluttered chat that can happen at large RP events, or in crowded environments.

Just some of the things you can do with Chat Tools is:
- Filter messages in crowded environments
- Set up windows to watch specific characters of your choice
- Set up windows to watch for messages from a group of characters
- Quickly scan what your selected or hovered targets have said
- Search through your message history
- Preserve messages on logout
Chat Tools.punchline: Filter messages in crowded environments, bringing some sanity back to RP.

Chat Translator AI.name: Chat Translator AI
Chat Translator AI.description: Translate FFXIV chat in real-time using AI.

ChatAlerts.name: ChatAlerts
ChatAlerts.description: Play sounds and highlight text based on defined filters.
ChatAlerts.punchline: Play sounds and highlight text based on defined filters.

ChatAlertsX.name: ChatAlertsX
ChatAlertsX.description: My custom version of ChatAlerts for FFXIV.

ChatAnywhere.name: ChatAnywhere
ChatAnywhere.description: Host your chat on a web server so you can talk from anywhere.
ChatAnywhere.punchline: Host your chat on a web server so you can talk from anywhere.

ChatContext.name: ChatContext
ChatContext.description: Add sender target name in chat messages and displays nearly player targets
ChatContext.punchline: Add sender target name in chat messages.

ChatCoordinates.name: ChatCoordinates
ChatCoordinates.description: Places flag marker on map from coordinates in chat. "/coord help" or "/ctp help" for more info.
ChatCoordinates.punchline: Places flag marker on map from coordinates in chat.

ChatDeathRoll.name: ChatDeathRoll
ChatDeathRoll.description: Provides link buttons in chat for death rolling

ChatEmoteColor.name: ChatEmoteColor
ChatEmoteColor.description: A simple plugin that recolors emote chat lines depending on who is executing the emote and their target.

ChatGPT for FFXIV.name: ChatGPT for FFXIV
ChatGPT for FFXIV.description: Lets you interact with ChatGPT through the in-game chat. Configuration requires an API key.

ChatHide.name: ChatHide
ChatHide.description: Plugin to display ACT combat log data.

ChatTyper.name: ChatTyper
ChatTyper.description: Prefixes all chatbox messages with their chat types.
ChatTyper.punchline: This is still mostly a dev tool for debugging, but people like it?

Chatter.name: Chatter
Chatter.description: Allows for saving chat conversations, separated by groups of people and chat types.

Chibi Omega.name: Chibi Omega
Chibi Omega.punchline: Aww, he's so cute! But don't let his diminished stature fool you; his damage output has not scaled to match.

Chill Frames.name: Chill Frames
Chill Frames.description: Tired of your GPU melting your face off while just running around? Why render at 240 FPS when you're just staring at that gathering node? Fret no more! Chill Frames allows you dynamically limit your framerate when doing unimportant tasks!
Chill Frames.punchline: Dynamic Framerate Limiter, changes fps limit depend on what you are doing

Chilled Leves.name: Chilled Leves
Chilled Leves.description: A leve helper that lets you select which ones you want to do, and help turn them in for you. YOU NEED NAVMESH INSTALLED AS AN FYI.
Chilled Leves.punchline: I heard you like your leves on the rocks.

Chocobo Colourized.name: Chocobo Colourized
Chocobo Colourized.description: (Personal Chocobo) Chocobo Colourized helps you find the most efficient sequence of fruits to feed your chocobo companion to reach your desired target colour. Use /chococolor to open the calculator.
Chocobo Colourized.punchline: (Personal Chocobo) Calculate+Automatically-feed the optimal fruit-feeding-path to change your chocobo's colour.

Chocobo Racing Gamba.name: Chocobo Racing Gamba
Chocobo Racing Gamba.description: Players pick a chocobo(s) to bet on, the host rolls /random to advance chocobos, and the first to reach the finish line wins. Type /crg or /Chocoboracinggamba to open the main window.
Chocobo Racing Gamba.punchline: Host Chocobo Racing Gamba with your friends in Eorzea!

Chocobot.name: Chocobot
Chocobot.description: A native Dalamud encounter callout engine powered by IINACT log events, with a cute chocobo for moral support!
Chocobot.punchline: Native IINACT-powered encounter callouts with a cute chocobo for moral support!

Chocoholic.name: Chocoholic
Chocoholic.description: Chocoholic is a plugin to automatically queue for and complete Chocobo races in FFXIV.

Choke-abo.name: Choke-abo
Choke-abo.description: (Racing Chocobo) Feed your Racing chocobo Grade 1-2-3 Feed. Includes automatic buying and feeding.
Choke-abo.punchline: (Racing Chocobo) Feed your Racing chocobo Grade 1-2-3 Feed. Includes automatic buying and feeding.

Chroma.name: Chroma
Chroma.description: Chroma is a simple accessibility tool that allows full color customization of all AOE omens/indicators - and then some.

Chronofoil.name: Chronofoil
Chronofoil.description:
Chronofoil is a plugin that allows you to capture in-game packets for analysis later.
It also allows you to upload a censored version of these captures to a central repository for
preservation and analysis. Privacy controls are at the center of Chronofoil, which is why it
requires two levels of user opt-in, has minimum delays on releasing any submitted user info,
and allows users to delete their submitted data at any time.

Clarity In Chaos.name: Clarity In Chaos
Clarity In Chaos.description: Automatically adjusts the Battle Effects settings according to Party size.
Clarity In Chaos.punchline: Seek visual serenity in the midst of Chaos

Clean Hunt Chat.name: Clean Hunt Chat
Clean Hunt Chat.punchline:
No more cringe during hunt trains.
Temporarily filters away Shouts and Yells that don't contain a flag or an instance message.

ClickCast.name: ClickCast
ClickCast.description: Remove the need to target people for healing, instead assign actions to mouse buttons and use them by clicking player names.

Clock.name: Clock
Clock.description:
Use this to know the current time in different timezones in a customizable way.
You can change the text scale, colors, position and even setup Alarms!
Clock.punchline: Tired of missing stuff cause everything is in another timezone? Say less.

CollectableCalculator.name: CollectableCalculator
CollectableCalculator.description: Shows how many scrips and items you would receive if you turn in your current inventory.
CollectableCalculator.punchline: Shows how many scrips and items you would receive if you turn in your current inventory.

Collections.name: Collections
Collections.description:
Collections provides an interface to track, discover and interact with your Collections in game.
Integrates with Glamour systems (Preview, Create Sets, Glamour Plates).
Supports: Glamour, Mounts, Minions, Emotes, Hairstyles, Triple Triad, Blue Mage, Bardings, Framer Kits, Orchestrions, Outfits, Fashion Accessories, Facewear.
Collections.punchline: Track, Discover and Interact with your Collections in game

Collector's Anxiety.name: Collector's Anxiety
Collector's Anxiety.description: Collector's Anxiety helps completionists or players with a hobby for collecting in-game things keep track of what they do or don't have in an easy-to-use checklist format. Data is loaded live from the game, so collection statuses are updated in real-time.
Collector's Anxiety.punchline: Hey guys, Famous YouTuber here. Do you ever get Collector's Anxiety?

Combat Cursor Containment.name: Combat Cursor Containment
Combat Cursor Containment.description: Automatically changes the 'limit mouse operation to game window' setting when entering/exiting combat.
Combat Cursor Containment.punchline: Keep your mouse cursor contained during combat!

Combat Helper.name: Combat Helper
Combat Helper.description: Gives u a pot reminder, a timeline of fights, keep track of spread/stack ..
Combat Helper.punchline: Never forget to use pots again and maybe some more usefull tool

Combat Simulator.name: Combat Simulator
Combat Simulator.description: A client-side combat simulator that lets you fight existing NPCs locally. Features NPC AI, combat animations, death effects (ragdoll physics), active camera (bone tracking), death cam, HP overlays, and glamourer integration. All combat is simulated locally - no data is sent to the server.
Combat Simulator.punchline: Fight existing NPCs in client-side combat simulation.

CombatHeadgear.name: CombatHeadgear
CombatHeadgear.description: Toggle headgear visibility in and out of combat.

Comfy Loot.name: Comfy Loot
Comfy Loot.description: Tracks the contents and market value of items dropped while killing monsters. And drops from some other activities such as dungeons, raids, gathering, and maps.

Conditional Tweaks.name: Conditional Tweaks
Conditional Tweaks.description: Changes game settings based on character state.
Conditional Tweaks.punchline: Tweaks and options based on the charactor's state.

Conga Helper.name: Conga Helper
Conga Helper.description: Rearrange party list from left to right: /conga
Conga Helper.punchline: Automatically rearrange party list for TOP.

Congratulations.name: Congratulations
Congratulations.description:
Get aurally rewarded when you get commended on duties.

Comes with default sounds for when you get commended by 1/3, 2/3, 3/3 or all seven members of the duty you were in, but you can set custom sounds for each type of trigger by opening /congratsconfig.

The fractioned values are in relation to how many of those members could commend you (i.e. excluding those that were in your party before joining the duty).
Congratulations.punchline: Get aurally rewarded when you get commended on duties.

ContactsTracker.name: ContactsTracker
ContactsTracker.description:
Remember to change setting according to your need.
Use the Settings button to enter analyze window.
ContactsTracker.punchline: Help you record duty and who you met.

Coordinate Importer.name: Coordinate Importer
Coordinate Importer.description: Import map coordinates from various sources (e.g. Siren Hunts or Bear Toolkit) and dump them into echo chat. Use /ci to open the dialog box.
Coordinate Importer.punchline: Import map coordinates to echo chat.

Cope, Seethe, Meld.name: Cope, Seethe, Meld
Cope, Seethe, Meld.description:
Auto melds your gear

Plugin from https://puni.sh/api/repository/xan
Cope, Seethe, Meld.punchline: Why would you make a plugin for something you do once or twice an expansion?

Coppelia.name: Coppelia
Coppelia.description: Healbot Coppelia is here to serve!  Healing from outside of party for n targets.
Coppelia.punchline: Healbot Coppelia is here to serve!  Healing from outside of party for n targets.

CountdownHide.name: CountdownHide
CountdownHide.description:
Suppresses the large on-screen countdown overlay produced by the /countdown command. The countdown still runs and fires normally — only the visual is hidden.

Commands:
/countdownhide — toggle the feature on/off
/countdownhide config — open settings
CountdownHide.punchline: Hides the on-screen visual when using the in-game /countdown.

Coyote-FFXiv.name: Coyote-FFXiv
Coyote-FFXiv.description: 通过条件触发实现郊狼的控制，对接Coyote。顺带支持一些RP小功能。

Craft Remaining.name: Craft Remaining
Craft Remaining.description: A simple plugin that displays how much progress and quality is remaining for your craft, without having to do the maths! Great to use in conjunction with Calculations or SimpleTweaks Improved Crafter Tooltips.
Craft Remaining.punchline: A simple plugin that displays how much progress and quality is remaining for your craft.

CraftAnalyzer.name: CraftAnalyzer
CraftAnalyzer.description: Calculates the raw material cost of crafted items using Universalis market data.
CraftAnalyzer.punchline: True Crafting Cost Analyzer for FFXIV.

Craftimizer.name: Craftimizer
Craftimizer.description: Allows you to generate macros and simulate all sorts of crafts without having to open another app. Open your crafting log to get started!
Craftimizer.punchline: Simulate crafts, create computer-assisted macros, and get mid-craft suggestions from the comfort of your own game!

Craftimizer (Unofficial).name: Craftimizer (Unofficial)
Craftimizer (Unofficial).description: Allows you to generate macros and simulate all sorts of crafts without having to open another app. Open your crafting log to get started!
Craftimizer (Unofficial).punchline: Unofficial/uncertified build of Craftimizer. Simulate crafts, create computer-assisted macros, and get mid-craft suggestions from the comfort of your own game!

Craftimizer Revived.name: Craftimizer Revived
Craftimizer Revived.description: Allows you to generate macros and simulate all sorts of crafts without having to open another app. Open your crafting log to get started!
Craftimizer Revived.punchline: Simulate crafts, create computer-assisted macros, and get mid-craft suggestions from the comfort of your own game!

CreateXIV.name: CreateXIV
CreateXIV.description: Lets players create custom slash command aliases from an in-game UI.
CreateXIV.punchline: Create your own custom slash commands.

Critical HP Indicator.name: Critical HP Indicator
Critical HP Indicator.description: Shows party list HP bars in red when HP is critical.

CrossUp.name: CrossUp
CrossUp.description:
This plugin provides customizations for the look and feel of the Cross Hotbar

-Split up the left/right hotbars
-Display Expanded Hold Controls Separately
-Customize colors and element positions

Crystal Terror.name: Crystal Terror
Crystal Terror.description: DM @mtvirux on discord for assistance or bug reports.
Crystal Terror.punchline: A plugin to track crystals, shards and clusters across your FFXIV accounts.

CrystalRadio.name: CrystalRadio
CrystalRadio.description:
Listen to your favorite internet radio stations directly in-game. Browse stations and manage your favorites.
Use /cradio to open the radio player
CrystalRadio.punchline: Stream internet radio stations while playing FFXIV

Currency Board.name: Currency Board
Currency Board.description: Track Gil, Tomestones, weekly caps, beast tribe reputation, and custom progression goals in a single, always-visible overlay. Use /currboard to toggle the display, /currboard config to open settings.
Currency Board.punchline: All your currencies, caps, and progression goals in one HUD.

Currency Spender.name: Currency Spender
Currency Spender.description: Figure out what to do with all the ingame currencies.
Currency Spender.punchline: Discover how to use all the in-game currencies.

Currency Tracker.name: Currency Tracker
Currency Tracker.description:
记录你每一笔货币收支的数额、时间、地点与来源
Track every change of your currecies with its Amount, Time, Location and Source

Currency Watchdog.name: Currency Watchdog
Currency Watchdog.description: Provides a configurable overlay, configurable alerts, and a powerful rule system for displaying how many currency (or non-currency) items you have (or don't have). A spiritual successor to CurrencyAlert.
Currency Watchdog.punchline: Shows an overlay and/or sends alerts when your held currency items (or non-currency items) match configurable rules. A spiritual successor to CurrencyAlert.

CurrencyAlert.name: CurrencyAlert
CurrencyAlert.description: This plugin lets you easily manage your various currencies to prevent from wasting precious resources.
CurrencyAlert.punchline: Display alerts upon reaching configurable currencies thresholds.

Cursor Indicator.name: Cursor Indicator
Cursor Indicator.description: Configurable cursor trails and a cursor ring indicators.
Cursor Indicator.punchline: Never lose your mouse cursor again!

CustomEqualizer.name: CustomEqualizer
CustomEqualizer.description: Did you know that the EQ presets in the system settings are powered by a 4-band EQ? Let's make our own presets!
CustomEqualizer.punchline: Tweak the built-in 4-band EQ with custom presets.

CustomResolution.name: CustomResolution
CustomResolution.description: Basic plugin that allows you to specify a custom resolution.
CustomResolution.punchline: Enforces a custom resolution for the game, similar to NVIDIA DSR.

Customize+.name: Customize+
Customize+.description: A plugin that allows you to customize your character beyond FFXIV limitations by directly editing bone parameters.
Customize+.punchline: Customize your character beyond FFXIV's limitations.

Cutscene Transcripts.name: Cutscene Transcripts
Cutscene Transcripts.description: Records dialog boxes shown during cutscenes and adds an in-game transcript button so you can review missed lines and replay audio without leaving the cutscene.
Cutscene Transcripts.punchline: Review cutscene dialog while it is happening.

DCTravelerX.name: DCTravelerX
DCTravelerX.description:
在选择角色界面, 右键对应角色, 即可进行超域旅行
需要使用 XIVLauncherCN 启动游戏, 不支持 WeGame 端
DCTravelerX.punchline: FF14 国服游戏内跨大区插件

DM Helper Tool.name: DM Helper Tool
DM Helper Tool.description: Send help I've been trapped in a sweatshop dear god please

DPS In Server Bar.name: DPS In Server Bar
DPS In Server Bar.description: Displays your real-time encounter DPS directly in the FFXIV server info bar. Connects to ACT via OverlayPlugin for accurate DPS tracking. Shows job name and final encounter DPS with a clear indicator when combat ends.
DPS In Server Bar.punchline: Clean DPS display integrated in your server info bar

DSR Toolbox.name: DSR Toolbox
DSR Toolbox.description:
Current functions:
Resolve eyes position
Wroth flames automarker (whole group and personal)
Tether to your chain partner
DSR Toolbox.punchline: A helper plugin for Dragonsong's Reprise (Ultimate).

DaCoblyn.name: DaCoblyn
DaCoblyn.description: Translate tools that allow you to communicate with foreign friend that you doesn't know what they're saying.

Dagobert - Price Matcher.name: Dagobert - Price Matcher
Dagobert - Price Matcher.description: Fork of Dagobert — matches the lowest market board price instead of undercutting. Default amount is 0 (exact match). You can still set a negative amount to undercut if desired.
Dagobert - Price Matcher.punchline: Matches (instead of undercuts) market board prices

Dailies Checklist.name: Dailies Checklist
Dailies Checklist.description:
A quality-of-life overlay that helps you track daily and weekly reset activities in Final Fantasy XIV. Features include:

- Categorized checklist for daily and weekly tasks
- Auto-detection for supported activities (roulettes, cactpot, beast tribes, etc.)
- Manual tracking for activities that cannot be auto-detected
- Automatic reset at daily/weekly reset times
- Persistent state across sessions
- Customizable task list and UI settings

Commands:
/dailies - Toggle the main checklist window
Dailies Checklist.punchline: Track your daily and weekly FFXIV activities in one convenient overlay.

Daily Routines.name: Daily Routines
Daily Routines.description:
海量自动化/易用性游戏系统优化模块合集, 帮你从一些无意义的重复性工作中解放出来
A massive collection of automation / QoL optimization modules to free you from meaningless repetitive tasks.
Daily Routines.punchline: 帮忙解决一些日常重复性劳动

Daily Routines (API 12).name: Daily Routines (API 12)
Daily Routines (API 12).description:
海量自动化/易用性游戏系统优化模块合集, 帮你从一些无意义的重复性工作中解放出来
A massive collection of automation / QoL optimization modules to free you from meaningless repetitive tasks.
Daily Routines (API 12).punchline: 帮忙解决一些日常重复性劳动 / Help with some of the daily repetitive tasks

Daily Routines (API 13).name: Daily Routines (API 13)
Daily Routines (API 13).description:
海量自动化/易用性游戏系统优化模块合集, 帮你从一些无意义的重复性工作中解放出来
A massive collection of automation / QoL optimization modules to free you from meaningless repetitive tasks.
Daily Routines (API 13).punchline: 帮忙解决一些日常重复性劳动 / Help with some of the daily repetitive tasks

Daily Routines (API 14).name: Daily Routines (API 14)
Daily Routines (API 14).description:
海量自动化/易用性游戏系统优化模块合集, 帮你从一些无意义的重复性工作中解放出来
A massive collection of automation / QoL optimization modules to free you from meaningless repetitive tasks.
Daily Routines (API 14).punchline: 帮忙解决一些日常重复性劳动 / Help with some of the daily repetitive tasks

DailyDuty.name: DailyDuty
DailyDuty.description: Automatically track and complete many daily and weekly tasks
DailyDuty.punchline: Easily Track Daily and Weekly tasks

DalamudRepoBrowser.name: DalamudRepoBrowser
DalamudRepoBrowser.description: An interface for browsing and managing third party repositories.
DalamudRepoBrowser.punchline: Browse and add third party repositories in an instant

Damage Info.name: Damage Info
Damage Info.description: Configurable UI options for extra damage information. /dmginfo displays the config.
Damage Info.punchline: Modifies in-game fly-text for more (or less) damage information.

Damage Terror.name: Damage Terror
Damage Terror.description: DM @mtvirux on discord for assistance or bug reports.
Damage Terror.punchline: Native ImGui damage meter overlay powered by IINACT

DcNotify.name: DcNotify
DcNotify.description: Mobile or Discord Webhook push notifications for the Party Finder.

Dealer.name: Dealer
Dealer.description: A fully-featured blackjack dealer plugin for FFXIV. Commands: /chatjack2 to open the dealer GUI. Players use > commands in /say chat to play. Features real-time chat updates, automatic or manual dealer control, and full game results.
Dealer.punchline: Play blackjack with your friends in FFXIV!

Death Key Chord Plugin.name: Death Key Chord Plugin
Death Key Chord Plugin.description: Sends key chord on death. Defaults to holding F24, but can be configured. Recommend to use with Push to Mute in Discord for silly reasons.

Death Recap.name: Death Recap
Death Recap.description:
Quickly figure out what killed you or your party members!

Shows:
- Healing
- Damage taken
- Debuffs
- Buffs
- Barriers
- Addle, Feint, Reprisal on damage source
Death Recap.punchline: Quickly figure out what killed you or your party members!

Death Roll Helper.name: Death Roll Helper
Death Roll Helper.description:
## Modes
### Venue:
- Concise display of all concurrent players in a list-based format
- Supports multiple sorting types (min, max, nearest to)
- Highlight numbers based on regex matching

### DeathRoll:
- Supports multiple players
- Automatic checks to prevent number skipping

### Tournament (1v1 DeathRoll):
- Automatic bracket generation with byes to fill uneven
- Forfeit functionality if a player needs to leave

### Blackjack:
- Automatic reward calculation based on common rules
- Simplistic, or visual view of cards in play
- Automatic or manual player-based draw for cards

### Extra Features:
- Block or prevent players from partaking in any game
- Accept only /random or /dice commands

## Games
### Tic-Tac-Toe
- Play against your friends, or AI
- Easy, Medium, Hard
- 3x3, 4x4, 5x5

### Minesweeper
- Easy, Medium, Hard
- 8x8, 9x9, 16x16, 18x30
- Custom Games (planned)

More features are planned, following user feedback.
Death Roll Helper.punchline: Plugin to help with a number of dice games. Also offers games like Tic-Tac-Toe, Minesweeper and Bahamood.

Deep Dungeon Tracker.name: Deep Dungeon Tracker
Deep Dungeon Tracker.description:
-Keep track of the number of kills, coffers opened, regeneration potions consumed, potsherds obtained, total time and more.
-Examine the collected data.
-Scoring.
Deep Dungeon Tracker.punchline: Track things inside Deep Dungeons (Solo only).

DeepDungeonDex.name: DeepDungeonDex
DeepDungeonDex.description:
A live bestiary for Deep Dungeon. Shows target mob aggro type, a subjective threat level, vulnerability to stun, and a general overview of notable mechanics. Threat level is meant to be taken with a grain of salt, is aimed towards solo players, and assumes a general familiarity with
deep dungeon mechanics and the class being played. Information is accurate to the best of my knowledge based on crowdsourced information, but please open an issue on the GitHub or ping me in either the Deep Dungeons or QuickLauncher Discord servers if anything is found to be inaccurate or if you'd like to make a report on untested data.

DeepDungeonScore.name: DeepDungeonScore
DeepDungeonScore.description: Deep Dungeon scoring and trap tracking plugin for Palace of the Dead and Heaven-on-High. Track your progress, avoid traps, and compete for high scores!
DeepDungeonScore.punchline: Deep Dungeon scoring and trap tracking for PotD and HoH

Defishinator.name: Defishinator
Defishinator.description: Automatically desynthesises all Seafood-category items from your inventory. Supports bulk desynth for stacks. Use /defish to open the window.
Defishinator.punchline: Desynthesises all the fish in your inventory.

DelvCD.name: DelvCD
DelvCD.description: DelvCD provides highly customizable UI elements that can be used to track cooldows, status and more with configurable conditions.
DelvCD.punchline: Customizable UI elements to track cooldowns, status and more.

DelvUI.name: DelvUI
DelvUI.description: DelvUI provides a highly configurable HUD replacement and is highly inspired by ElvUI from WoW
DelvUI.punchline: A modern HUD replacement built for customization.

Dematerial Desynthesis.name: Dematerial Desynthesis
Dematerial Desynthesis.description: A little helper that lets you retrieval of all materia and then desynth an item.

• Hint mode (default): shows the best tile to discard and a short explanation. You still click every move.
• Auto-play: the plugin watches the table and clicks for you with natural pacing.

Fashion Report Calculator / Dye Finder.name: Fashion Report Calculator / Dye Finder
Fashion Report Calculator / Dye Finder.description:
This is the new and improved Fashion Report System. This plugin will allow you to open a window that will show you what your fashion report status is vs the current week's theme.

There are a few parts to this. Since the only way to get Fashion Report for the week to my knowledge is speaking to Masked Rose after Tuesdays reset, this plugin takes the first person who does talk to him and updates everyone else. So only one person per week needs to speak to Masked Rose.

You can click on a theme and pull all the known items for that theme for that specific slot. You also get a very detailed breakdown of how much points you are getting based on what you are currently wearing.

The plugin also stores the attempts of those using the mod (just the data from fashioncheck, no user information) so that we can figure out the dyes faster and share information faster. The information in this table is wiped every week since once we discover the dyes, it is useless.

I still have more upgrades to do, including adding a dye window and the window that will help calculate the weekly dyes. I already have an idea of how I want to write them, so it shouldn't take me too long. If you have suggestions on how I can upgrade this, please share with me on github!

Credit for the program goes to it's original creator, WillWolf76, who wrote this for me originally.

When this plugin updates the database, it also updates my Discord Bot which you can set up to post fashion report each week. It's set to update on Tuesdays and Fridays (week start and dye information added). Link to add the Discord Bot is in the about section.
Fashion Report Calculator / Dye Finder.punchline: Know your Fashion Report points on the spot and help crowdsource new items and dyes!

GoodFriend.name: GoodFriend
GoodFriend.description:
Key Features:
- Receive notifications when friends using GoodFriend log in or out.
- Chat messages show how many of your friends are online when you log in.

Developer's Note on Using This Plugin After Patch 7.0:
As of Patch 7.0, some of the data that GoodFriend uses to identify players during login/logout events is now visible to anyone nearby your character in-game (not just your friends or party members). GoodFriend itself will still only show notifications for people you've added to your in-game friends list - however, please use this plugin only if you're comfortable with your login/logout activity being theoretically visible to nearby players (note: GoodFriend never sends data for users who don't have the plugin installed).

If you ever want to stop sending login/logout events, simply disable or uninstall the plugin. The server does not store any data about you.

For added privacy, you can now set a 'group key' in the plugin settings. This allows events to be shared only with people using the same key (for example, everyone in your raid group). When a group key is active, your events are never visible to anyone outside your group no matter what.
GoodFriend.punchline: Improvements to the in-game friend system, including login and logout notifications for your friends, and more.

Macro Chain.name: Macro Chain
Macro Chain.description: Allows macros to continue into the next macro

Macro Chain Gone Wild.name: Macro Chain Gone Wild
Macro Chain Gone Wild.description:
Allows for a macro to continue onto the next macro by using '/nextmacro' on the last line of a macro.
Adding '/nextmacro' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #02
Adding '/nextmacro down' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #11
Adding '/nextmacro loop' on the last line of a macro will loop that macro until another macro is run.
Also allows executing any macro from chat using '/runmacro'. This also works from within another macro.
Macro Chain Gone Wild.punchline: Run multiple macros one after the other.

Macro Chain Redux.name: Macro Chain Redux
Macro Chain Redux.description:
Allows for a macro to continue onto the next macro by using '/nextmacro' on the last line of a macro.
Adding '/nextmacro' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #02
Adding '/nextmacro down' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #11
Also allows executing any macro from chat using '/runmacro'
You can repeat a macro by using /runmacro inside the macro followed by the number of the macro you're editing
Using '/macrocancel' will stop the currently running macro
Macro Chain Redux.punchline: A modified fork of the old Macro Chain that allows you to run multiple macros one after the other (or repeat them).

Macro Chain-Ori.name: Macro Chain-Ori

- Store longer macros and automatically split them across multiple macro slots.
- Use almost any icon in the game for your Macros
Macro Mate.punchline: Store and run an unlimited number of macros. Bind them to normal macro slots.

Neko Fans.punchline: Frustrated in a dungeon? Look at a cute cat girl!

This plugin is in testing and will have one or more issues, laid out below:

- Rarely, a glitched desynth window will pop up when saving the gearset instead of it saving the portait. This is being investigated, closing the window and swapping classes seems to fix it.

Please report issues/bugs and post suggestions on the Github website by clicking the globe icon.

Pose Browser.description: A pose browser interfacing with brio.
Pose Browser.punchline: A pose browser to work with Brio.

Positional Assistant.name: Positional Assistant

Price Insight.name: Price Insight

Whenever you mouseover an item, it will show you the NQ/HQ marketboard prices at the bottom as well as the most recent purchase.

Price Insight CN.name: Price Insight CN

价格从 Universalis.app 中搜索，缓存保存90分钟。

Prioritizer.name: Prioritizer

Prittoto Pritto's Tracery Plugin.description: /Trace to bring up the UI or give it a string to flatten. See Tracery.io for more on what it can do.

Project Second Promise.name: Project Second Promise

PromeRotation.name: PromeRotation
PromeRotation.description: An advanced combat rotation platform for FFXIV high-end content.

Proteus.name: Proteus

ProvokeCounter.name: ProvokeCounter
ProvokeCounter.description: Displays a counter badge on the party list for each party member who uses Provoke. Resets per zone. Toggle with /provokecounter, reset with /provokecounter reset.
ProvokeCounter.punchline: Counts how many times tanks provoke in your party.

ProximityVoiceChat.name: ProximityVoiceChat

Pull Reminders.name: Pull Reminders
Pull Reminders.description: Checks your food buff, gear condition, inventory items, and party food status before pulling. Shows a clear green/yellow/red overlay so your static never pulls unprepared.
Pull Reminders.punchline: Pre-pull readiness checker for savage/ultimate raids.

PullToOBS.name: PullToOBS
PullToOBS.description: A Dalamud plugin that automatically controls OBS recording during FFXIV encounters. Captures replay buffer before pulls and full encounter recordings via OBS WebSocket v5. Use /pulltoobs or /pto to configure.
PullToOBS.punchline: Automated OBS recording manager for FFXIV encounters.

Puppet Master.name: Puppet Master

PushyFinder.name: PushyFinder
PushyFinder.description: A plugin that uses Pushover (https://pushover.net), Discord, SimplePush (http://simplepush.io), or Ntfy (https://ntfy.sh) to send mobile push notifications when party members join or leave, or when a duty finder queue is initiated.
PushyFinder.punchline: Mobile push notifications for the Party Finder.

PvP Solver.name: PvP Solver
PvP Solver.description: Auto-rotation for FFXIV PvP only. Automatically activates in PvP zones. Designed to run alongside Wrath Combo (handles PvE). Includes default PvP rotations for all jobs.

PvP Tracker.name: PvP Tracker

PvP Tracker (API 15).name: PvP Tracker (API 15)
PvP Tracker (API 15).description: Record, browse and filter your Crystalline Conflict, Frontline and Rival Wings match history, view match scoreboards and view aggregated statistics like win rate and average damage dealt per match. Community fork of wrath16/PvpStats restoring compatibility with Dalamud API 15 (FFXIV patch 7.5).
PvP Tracker (API 15).punchline: PvP match history and stats tracker — Dalamud API 15 fork.

PvPAnnouncer.name: PvPAnnouncer
PvPAnnouncer.description: This plugin will cause character voice lines to play mid-match upon specific conditions being met.

A plugin designed to provide a simple, customizable and always available interface for chat commands
or other plugins to alleviate the need for using macros and hotbar space to achieve similar results.

The plugin should initially appear as a small box on the bottom center of the game window.

Quack.name: Quack

Quest Map.name: Quest Map
Quest Map.description:
Explore quests and their rewards.
- Search for quest names or their rewards, including instances,
  beast tribes, minions, etc.
- See an interactive map of quest requirements and unlocks.
- Open a quest info window even for quests you haven't completed.

Quest Share.name: Quest Share
Quest Share.description: Follow your friends on their questing journey by seeing their progress through a shared quest. Provides markers for quest destinations and (soon) teleporting features.
Quest Share.punchline: Share your quest progress with others.

Help you to solve the quests. It is still working in progress! I am lazy, you know!
vnavmesh required!
Quest Solver.punchline: Help you to solve the quests!

Quest Tracker Reborn.name: Quest Tracker Reborn
Quest Tracker Reborn.description: For the quest completionist, now updated

QuestAWAY.name: QuestAWAY
QuestAWAY.description: Removes unwanted icons from your map.
QuestAWAY.punchline: Removes unwanted icons from your map.

QuestJournal.name: QuestJournal
QuestJournal.description: Quest Journal is a detailed quest tracker / viewer. Letting you see information about quest chains without using a wiki.
QuestJournal.punchline: See details about quests that the FFXIV doesn't tell you.

QuestNav.name: QuestNav
QuestNav.description: QuestNav lists all your active quests and adds a Teleport button next to each one. Clicking it teleports you to the nearest unlocked aetheryte to the quest's location ? no more hunting through the map.
QuestNav.punchline: One-click teleport to the nearest aetheryte for each active quest.

Questionable.name: Questionable
Questionable.description:
A small quest helper plugin designed to automatically do your quests for you where possible. Utilizes navmesh to automatically travel to all quest waypoints and (attempts to) complete all steps along the way (excluding dungeons, single-player duties and combat).

Not all quests are supported.

Required Plugins: vnavmesh, TextAdvance, Lifestream

Questionable (CN).name: Questionable (CN)
Questionable (CN).description:
一个小型的任务助手插件，可以在可能的情况下自动执行任务。使用寻路自动走到所有任务目标点，并尽量自动完成所有步骤。

并非所有任务都受支持，请查看Discord或Git仓库以获取最新的支持任务列表。

所需插件：vnavmesh, TextAdvance, Lifestream
versions: Liza Carvelli, decorwdyun(汉化), various contributor
Questionable (CN).punchline: 一个小小的的自动任务插件。

Questionable Companion.name: Questionable Companion
Questionable Companion.description:
Automated character rotation and quest sequence execution for Questionable.

Automates multi-character MSQ progression by intelligently switching between characters based on quest completion and level requirements. Features include:
- Automatic character switching and quest tracking
- MSQ progression monitoring across all characters
- Allied Society quest rotation and prioritization
- Event quest automation with prerequisite checking
- Chauffeur Mode for following main character through quests
- Data Center travel automation
- Stop point configuration for controlled progression

Required Plugins: Questionable, AutoRetainer
Questionable Companion.punchline: Automated character rotation and quest sequence execution

Questionable JSON Builder.name: Questionable JSON Builder
Questionable JSON Builder.description: Build Questionable quest JSON files via UI.

Questionable Plus.name: Questionable Plus
Questionable Plus.description:
The actively maintained and improved quest helper plugin for a smoother questing experience.

This plugin automates quests with enhanced pathing, reliable combat integration (e.g., Boss Mod and Wrath Combo), and consistent stability. It leverages tools like Vnavmesh for precise navigation, LifeStream for efficient travel, and TextAdvance for dialogue handling, keeping pace with game updates and user needs.

Originally created by Liza Carvelli.
Questionable Plus.punchline: The ultimate quest helper plugin, actively maintained and feature-packed.

QuickSwitch.name: QuickSwitch
QuickSwitch.description: Detects your characters on login and lets you quickly switch between them with a single click. Supports both quick logout to character select and fully automated character switching. Features safety guards (cooldowns, confirmations, blocks during combat/duties/cutscenes/crafting/gathering), Discord bot integration for remote switching, and admin controls (whitelist/blacklist, force switch/logout, audit logging).

RPP - Roleplay Profiles.description: A plugin for roleplayers, displaying character profiles from Central Archives (centralarchives.org) and its regional RP portals, Chaos Archives (chaosarchives.org) and Crystal Archives (crystalarchives.org), for characters with the RP flag on.

Dalamud Wrapper for Craft Solver Raphael / 生产求解器 Raphael 的 Dalamud 包装

RedMoonCappuccino.description: Connects to your FC's WebSocket server to display the lowest market tax rate and location, as well as upcoming and past FC events with event images.

Uploads the PF listings you retrieve to the crowdsourced Remote
Party Finder website (https://xivpf.com/).

Render Adjust.name: Render Adjust
Render Adjust.description: Allows you to dynamically adjust the in-game setting for rendered objects by FPS (and GPU Usage if you're on windows) and allows you to set a custom number of rendered objects manually. Uses GPU usage and FPS on Windows, and FPS only on Wine.
Render Adjust.punchline: Dynamically adjust your object rendering settings.

RenderTrim.name: RenderTrim
RenderTrim.description: Per-subsystem render hook trimming for FFXIV. Disables individual rendering subsystems (animations, models, vfx, water, lights, etc.) to reduce CPU on idle multibox clients beyond what a basic render-skip plugin achieves. Each trim is independently toggleable. Includes a Working Set memory trim that dramatically reduces RAM footprint of background/AFK clients, and a multibox broadcast feature that propagates configuration to peer clients with one click.
RenderTrim.punchline: Trim CPU, GPU, and RAM on idle multibox clients via per-subsystem render hooks.

RepairMe.name: RepairMe
RepairMe.description: Helps you notice when your gear needs to be repaired or has materia to be extracted. /repairme to config
RepairMe.punchline: Never forget to repair & extract materia again!

RepeatBuy.name: RepeatBuy
RepeatBuy.description: Embeds a small overlay next to the standard NPC Shop window. Pick an item from the mirrored shop list, choose a stop condition (fixed count >99 OK, until owned, gil floor, inventory full), and the plugin handles the repeat purchases for you. Shows an estimated total cost popup before starting and warns in red if you cannot afford it. Six-language UI (EN/JA/DE/FR/ZH/KO).
RepeatBuy.punchline: Repeat-buy items from NPC shops with stop conditions.

Res Stack Counter.name: Res Stack Counter
Res Stack Counter.description: List various information about nearby players such as Phantom Job, Remaining Resurrection Stacks in Forked Tower: Blood and Knowledge Level. Use /ressc [settings] to open the main or settings window.

Reset enmity command.name: Reset enmity command

Resizable HUD.name: Resizable HUD
Resizable HUD.description: Allows you to more freely and precisely scale and position HUD elements.
Resizable HUD.punchline: Move and scale vanilla hud elements to your liking!

Resonant.name: Resonant
Resonant.description: Displays accurate player hitbox and positional outlines.

Restocker.name: Restocker
Restocker.description: Cross-retainer market workbench with a plan-then-apply flow. Reprice tab: per-retainer 'lowest -N g' / 'lowest exact' buttons walk each listing, fetch live market data via Dalamud's IMarketBoard.OfferingsReceived (skipping your own retainers, deduplicated per item/HQ), stage every change in a queue, then commit them all via a single Apply that calls SetRetainerMarketPrice directly. New listing tab: per-row qty x slots, target retainer combo, auto stack-splitting (e.g. 990 / 99 → ten listings of 99), and direct listing from character bag / Chocobo Saddlebag with no entrust step (saddle items are bulk-staged to the bag in one phase, then listed). Live progress dialog shows the current step (selecting retainer, fetching market data, listing, …) so long runs don't look frozen. Six-language UI (EN/JA/DE/FR/ZH/KO). Warns once at startup if AutoRetainer is also loaded since both drive retainer summoning.
Restocker.punchline: Bulk reprice and split-list retainer market listings across all retainers.

Retainer Alerts.name: Retainer Alerts
Retainer Alerts.description: A simple plugin to remind you when your retainers are done with their ventures.

Retainer Inventory Price.name: Retainer Inventory Price
Retainer Inventory Price.description: Scans your retainer inventories when you open them and calculates their total estimated market value using Universalis prices.
Retainer Inventory Price.punchline: Calculate the total market value of all your retainers

Retainer Price Drop.name: Retainer Price Drop
Retainer Price Drop.description: Adds a 'Lower Prices' button to each retainer that automatically adjusts all their market listings by a set amount.
Retainer Price Drop.punchline: Drop all retainer prices with one click

Retainer Repricer.name: Retainer Repricer
Retainer Repricer.description: Automates retainer item listing and repricing by cycling through retainers, reading market prices from Universalis, and updating listings safely. Use /repricer or /rr to open.
Retainer Repricer.punchline: Automates retainer item repricing and listing using live market data.

Retainer Sales.name: Retainer Sales
Retainer Sales.description: Quickly see which retainers have sold something while you were logged off.

RezPls.name: RezPls
RezPls.description: Easy overview about who is currently resurrecting who, who is already resurrected, and who has removable detrimental status effects.
RezPls.punchline: Highlighting of Raises and detrimental status effects.

Rotation Solver.name: Rotation Solver
Rotation Solver.description:

Then, it will highlight the best action on the hot bar, or help you to click on it.

It is designed for GENERAL COMBAT, not for savage or ultimate. Use it carefully.

It is recommended that you create regular backups whilst using this plugin incase something does does break - upon install a check will be ran to see if at least one system/character configuration backup has been created; You will not be able to use the plugin if until you have created one.

SharkChat.name: SharkChat
SharkChat.description:
SharkChat intercepts your chat before it's sent and swaps words or phrases for whatever you want.

Set up rules like Thanks → Thankies, and they'll apply automatically every time you chat — across any channel.

Features:
• Whole-word matching (so "tank" won't mangle "thanks")
• Case-insensitive by default
• Per-rule enable/disable
• Live preview so you can test rules before using them

Commands:
/shark — toggle on/off
/shark config — open settings
SharkChat.punchline: Auto-replace words in your outgoing chat messages.

NB: there are some oddities to how Item Dyeing and Glamour Plate Selection behave when this plugin is doing its thing. If you’d rather it not touch those windows at all, there’s an option for that (and more details about the problem) in the settings.

Icon adapted from OpenMoji, CC BY-SA 4.0.

It allows scripts to draw shapes, markers, labels, and indicators directly in the game world. These overlays can be attached to actors, positions, or events, and are rendered with precise positioning.

Splatoon does not include presets or encounter logic by default. If you want presets, you must create them yourself or import them from others.

Sticky Focus Target.name: Sticky Focus Target
Sticky Focus Target.description:
(PvE-only.) Adds the /stickyfocustarget command, which focuses your current
target, as long as you do not already have a focus target set.
  
Have you ever felt focusing was under-utilised? Wanted to use it without a
dedicated keybind? Do you not even know what focus targeting is?
You've come to the right place.
  
You can add this command to your Attack Nearest macro and ensure that the
first enemy you target will also become focused, and stay that way, until it dies.
With this, you can focus enemies without having to consciously press a keybind,
and ensure that, for instance, when a focused boss spawns an add and you target it,
the boss' focus will NOT get overriden.

This plugin does not change the behaviour of the stock /focustarget command,
and must be triggered either manually or by adding it to a macro.
Placeholders are supported.

Stop The Clip.name: Stop The Clip
Stop The Clip.description: Do you want to take close up screenshots? Are you a melee and hate having the boss model disappear on you? Then this is the plugin for you, it overrides the near clip and stops models from hiding on camera collision. This plugin is based on XIVR code.

Supermarket Sweep.name: Supermarket Sweep

Target Furniture.name: Target Furniture

This plugin adds a new option in the Housing Menu that targets the furniture for you
Target Furniture.punchline: You can now select furnitures from the Housing Menu

Team Fortress Fantasy.name: Team Fortress Fantasy
Team Fortress Fantasy.description:
* Show a Win Panel (with sounds!) when you clear or get wiped in a duty.
* Show a TF2-style timer while in a duty.
* Enable the "Voice Lines" module (via /tfconfig) to have voice lines play when certain conditions are met. What conditions, you ask? It's a surprise! (Unless you uncheck the "Surprise me!" box.)
* More features maybe soon?

Note: This plugin uses files from a local Team Fortress 2 installation.
It'll search for the game's installation folder in all configured Steam Library Folders automatically.

Without a TF2 install, the Timer and Win Panel will work with FF XIV fonts, and no voice line will work.
Team Fortress Fantasy.punchline:
[REQUIRES TF2 INSTALLED FOR MOST FEATURES] The Mann Brothers just found a deposit of gravel in Eorzea
and hired YOU, Mercenary of Light, to help them FIGHT for it.

Teamcraft List Maker.name: Teamcraft List Maker
Teamcraft List Maker.description:
No more alt tabbing, no more writing down names of items, just add and export!

This plugin is not created by Teamcraft staff and they are not responsible for it. To report issues or request new features, please click the globe icon and submit them using the issues tab.

(Logo used with permission from Teamcraft owner)

Teiden.name: Teiden

Text Box Styler.name: Text Box Styler

ThaiUI.name: ThaiUI

The Great Controller HUD Switcher.name: The Great Controller HUD Switcher

versions: Callum Carmicheal (with help from Aida Enna)

The Great Separator.name: The Great Separator
The Great Separator.description:
Add separators to various numbers.

- Damage/healing numbers (not DoTs or other players' numbers)
- Party list HP
- Ability costs on hotbars
- Ability costs in tooltips

The Heart of the Party.name: The Heart of the Party
The Heart of the Party.description:
The Heart of the Party is a remake of the in-game title picker, but it
supports searching. Note that it doesn't add a command to set your title; use
the built-in /title command instead.
The Heart of the Party.punchline: Set your character's title - now with Searchalin!

TheDot.name: TheDot
TheDot.description: A dot to mark players hitbox
TheDot.punchline: A dot to mark players hitbox.

Thick Thighs Save Lives.description: An essential-state HUD for monitoring zone, position, combat state, durability, and party awareness when your main rendering setup is intentionally reduced.
Thick Thighs Save Lives.punchline: Keep critical HUD state visible when the world gets stripped down.

Threshold Checker.name: Threshold Checker
Threshold Checker.description: Helps track health targets based on time goals. Useful for when you need to check if you're ahead of a known enrage time or a set kill time.
Threshold Checker.punchline: Checks boss health against time thresholds.

Tick Tracker.name: Tick Tracker
Tick Tracker.description: Customizable bars that indicate the tick progress of HP/MP/GP regen

Tidy Chat.name: Tidy Chat
Tidy Chat.description:
It is highly recommended to edit the default settings as you may disagree on which messages should be considered "spam"!

Provides granular filter options to filter nearly all game-related spam, leaving only important game messages in your chat.

  - Filters most spammy game messages
  - Blocks emote spam from other players
  - Condenses earned commendations into a single line
  - Shortens lengthy messages such as joining Novice Network or entering an instanced zone
  - Blocks repeated messages from appearing for a period of time
  - Automatically copies most 'with your chat mode in /say' quest dialogue to your clipboard
  - Write custom filters to Allow/Block messages!
  - And more!
Tidy Chat.punchline: Better game messages and in-depth chat filters to keep a tidy chat.

Tilted.name: Tilted
Tilted.description: Automatically adjusts the Third Person Camera Angle/Distance given certain conditions.

TimelineAnimator.description: A simple keyframe editor to create and play back animations using Ktisis. Use /animator to open the plugin window.
TimelineAnimator.punchline: A keyframe animator for in-game animation.

TinyCommands.name: TinyCommands
TinyCommands.description: Adds tiny and simple but useful chat commands, and nothing more. It doesn't even have a UI.

Tippy.name: Tippy
Tippy.description:
Developed by goat for April Fools 2021 and unnecessarily resurrected by kal and adopted by Critical-Impact.

Handcrafted by our finest code artisans with special AI, 
he will analyze your playstyle to give you useful tips to get your GAMING to the next level.

Some things he can do:
* He can give general tips about the game
* He can give tips about the job you're playing
* He can report on your battle performance
* He will respect your feelings
Tippy.punchline: Tippy, your new FFXIV virtual assistant.

Title Edit.name: Title Edit
Title Edit.description:
Create your own custom title or character select screen of your favorite location in-game, and open the game right up to that spot every time.
Includes a number of preinstalled title and character select screen presets for you to use or get inspiration from, and an easy to use importer to use presets that others have shared!
Character select presets support recording your last visited location, per character display setting and even displaying yourself on a mount.

use title screens that others have shared!

Current features include queue time estimates and notifications via Discord, so you can know when you make it into the game, as well as anonymously collecting and reporting statistics about your queue times to crowdsource information about FFXIV server load and activity. Join our Discord for more information!

Discord URL: https://waiting.camora.dev/discord
Waitingway.punchline: Set out for Dawntrail and make your queues a breeze. Waitingway provides crowdsourced FFXIV login queue times, now with Discord queue notification features.

Who Did That?.name: Who Did That?
Who Did That?.description:
This plugin can track the following actions:
- Rescues
- Healing actions
- Status/Buff Application
- Cleanses 
- Heals
- Mitigation
- Provoke
- Shirk

These will be logged in your chat when they are used on your character.
Who Did That?.punchline: Actively logs healing, cleanses, buffs, and more. Finally figure out who rescued you.

Who Emoted At Me.name: Who Emoted At Me
Who Emoted At Me.description: Tracks who emoted at you and shows configurable on-screen notifications.
Who Emoted At Me.punchline: See who emoted at you with customizable toast notifications.

Who Said What Now.name: Who Said What Now
Who Said What Now.description:
Chat history plugin, view history per character, per group, or search.
 Main command /whowhat
Who Said What Now.punchline: Chat history plugin, view history per character, per group, or search.

Who am I again?.name: Who am I again?
Who am I again?.description: Shows who you are in the server info bar.
Who am I again?.punchline: Ever forget who you are? We can fix that!

Who's Talking.name: Who's Talking
Who's Talking.description:
Once installed, join a Discord voice channel and an XIV party, and have people put their character names in their Discord nicknames (or configure things manually in the plugin settings). You should get colourful outlines around the job icons on the party list: green for talking, blue for muted, red for deafened, and yellow for unknown name.

Note that you'll get a permission prompt mentioning "StreamKit Overlay" – this is expected.

Some icons by Google, Apache 2.0.
Who's Talking.punchline: See Discord voice activity indicators directly on your party list.

Wholist.name: Wholist
Wholist.description:
Show nearby players in a stylish way, inspired by the "/who" command from World of Warcraft

Features:
- Minimalistic interface that can be scaled down to become part of your HUD.
- Player context menu items for examining, searching on the Lodestone and more.
- Customizable colours & behaviour.
- Random adventure plate command
- Display nearby player count in the server info bar

Please note this plugin will automatically disable functionality in PvP.
Wholist.punchline: Show nearby players in a stylish way, inspired by the "/who" command from World of Warcraft.

Wikilinx Rightclicks.name: Wikilinx Rightclicks

Wrath Combo.name: Wrath Combo
Wrath Combo.description: Turns one action into many! Similar to how PvP actions work, we take an action and build a whole combo out of it. Sometimes it's as simple as a 1-2-3 combo, other times it's a full job rotation. Either way, you'll find something suited for your rotation needs.
Wrath Combo.punchline: Condenses combos and mutually exclusive abilities onto a single button - and then some.

WukLamark.name: WukLamark
WukLamark.description:
Allows players to create and manage persistent custom map markers across Eorzea. Whether it's a favorite GPose spot, a venue you want to revisit, or any interesting location, WukLamark lets you drop a map marker that appears seamlessly on both your main map and minimap.

Features:
- Customizable game icons and shapes for map markers (with optional icon tinting).
- Custom map marker icons.
   > To add a custom icon, open the WukLamark window and click on 'Upload a new custom icon'.
- Per-marker icon/shape sizes.
- Organize map markers into groups (with map marker import/export).
- Cross-character sharing configurations.
- Crossworld markers.
- Add personal notes for context.
- Import/export one or multiple map markers with friends.

Think of it as dropping a flag on the map but persistent.
WukLamark.punchline: Create custom map markers on the map/minimap! Like <flag> but permanent.

XIV Venue Manager Sync.description: In-game companion for XIV Venue Manager, a venue-management platform for FFXIV player-run venues (xivvenuemanager.com). Tracks patron entry and exit at your venue, logs sales and services to your web dashboard in real time, and keeps guest lists in sync with the staff, roles, and services you configure on the website. Set up an account at xivvenuemanager.com, generate an API key from the dashboard, and paste it into this plugin's Settings tab to start syncing.
XIV Venue Manager Sync.punchline: In-game companion for xivvenuemanager.com — log patron visits, sales, and services without leaving FFXIV.

This plugin allows players to use an Elgato Stream Deck as a virtual utility hot bar. Actions are called directly, meaning there is no need to set up awkward keybinds, custom macros, or any other settings.

Note that the XIVDeck Stream Deck plugin must also be installed for this plugin to be useful. You can download the Stream Deck plugin from the linked GitHub repository, under the "Releases" section.

Please report all problems to KazWolfe#2896 in the Dalamud Support server or by opening an Issue on GitHub.
XIVDeck.punchline: Turn your Elgato Stream Deck into a hotbar!

XIVJitterFix.name: XIVJitterFix
XIVJitterFix.description:
With the release of 7.0 SquareEnix has implemented several temporal antialiasing solutions. However they all have a severe bug that affects image quality significantly.
This plugin will restore using jitter when talking to NPCs or in cutscenes and gpose. Jitter (not noticeable micromovements of the camera) is necessary for temporal antialiasing solutions (DLSS, DLAA, TSCMAA+jitter) to work properly.
For some reason, SquareEnix decided we don't need jitter during the time where the game benefits from using it the most.
